user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I’m just following up on your ticket from 5 days ago to make sure everything is still working as expected.

If you’re all set, no further action is needed. If anything has come up or you’re seeing the same issue again, just reply here and I’ll be happy to help.

Best,
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by drafting a professional and empathetic follow-up message as instructed.
